# AIdeazz — Building in Public with AI

> A solo founder building a company with AI agents. Honest lessons on AI-augmented building, marketing engines, and shipping in production. By Elena Revicheva.

- Host: Elena Revicheva (solo founder, AIdeazz; Panama)
- Format: Technology podcast, episodic, language en
- RSS feed: https://podcast.aideazz.xyz/feed.xml
- Website: https://podcast.aideazz.xyz
- Parent project: AIdeazz (https://aideazz.xyz) — multi-agent AI systems built in production

## What this podcast covers
Honest, failure-first lessons from building a company with AI agents: AI-augmented development, multi-agent orchestration, marketing engines (GEO/SEO/AEO), attribution over vanity metrics, voice automation, and shipping resilient systems as a solo founder.

## Episodes
- First episode launching soon.
